base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fiend_lich — a character (boss) from 1987 final fantasy. Lich — Earth Fiend, first of 4 Elemental Fiends. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Lich — Earth Fiend, first of 4 Elemental Fiends
